pairs.english: my ansible, a few instruments and a change of clothes,
pairs.hanzi: 只有我的安思波、一点仪器和一套换洗衣物，

pairs.target: zuòwéi yìmíng chéngkè , dā shàng le shāngduì de chē ,
pairs.english: set off as passenger on a trade-caravan on the
pairs.hanzi: 作为一名乘客，搭上了商队的车，

pairs.target: zài xiàjì dìyīgè yuè de dìyītiān chūfā .
pairs.english: first day of the first month of summer.
pairs.hanzi: 在夏季第一个月的第一天出发。

pairs.target: lù chuán zài tiāngāngliàng shí cóng fēngchuī dé hūxiào de zhuāngxiè chǎng chūfā ,
pairs.english: The landboats left at daybreak from the windswept loading-yards
pairs.hanzi: 陆船在天刚亮时从风吹得呼啸的装卸场出发，

pairs.target: wèiyú xīngǎng .
pairs.english: of the New Port.
pairs.hanzi: 位于新港。

pairs.target: tāmen shǐguò gǒngmén hòu zhuǎnxiàng dōngfāng ,
pairs.english: They drove under the Arch and turned east,
pairs.hanzi: 它们驶过拱门后转向东方，

pairs.target: èrshí liàng bènzhòng ér ānjìng de
pairs.english: twenty bulky, quiet-running,
pairs.hanzi: 二十辆笨重而安静的

pairs.target: lǚdàishì bóchuán bānde kǎchē ,
pairs.english: barge-like trucks on caterpillar treads,
pairs.hanzi: 履带式驳船般的卡车，

pairs.target: yíliàng jiē yíliàng dì chuānguò āi lún lǎng shēnsuì de jiēdào ,
pairs.english: going single file down the deep streets of Erhenrang
pairs.hanzi: 一辆接一辆地穿过埃伦朗深邃的街道，

pairs.target: zài chénxī de yīnyǐng zhōng qiánxíng .
pairs.english: through the shadows of morning.
pairs.hanzi: 在晨曦的阴影中前行。

pairs.target: tāmen yùnzài zhe yìxiāng xiāng jìngpiàn ,
pairs.english: They carried boxes of lenses,
pairs.hanzi: 它们运载着一箱箱镜片，

pairs.target: yíjuàn juàn lùyīndài ,
pairs.english: reels of sound tapes,
pairs.hanzi: 一卷卷录音带，

pairs.target: yì zhóu zhóu tóngsī hé bó sī ,
pairs.english: spools of copper and platinum wire,
pairs.hanzi: 一轴轴铜丝和铂丝，

pairs.target: háiyǒu xīchuí zhǒngzhí bìng fǎngzhī de zhíwùxiānwéi bùpǐ ,
pairs.english: bolts of plant-fiber cloth raised and woven in the
pairs.hanzi: 还有西陲种植并纺织的植物纤维布匹，

pairs.target: xiāng zhuāng de hǎiwān gān yúpiàn ,
pairs.english: West Fall, chests of dried fish-flakes from the Gulf,
pairs.hanzi: 箱装的海湾干鱼片，

pairs.target: yìxiāng xiāng zhóuchéng hé qítā xiǎoxíng jīxièlíngjiàn ,
pairs.english: crates of ball bearings and other small machine parts,
pairs.hanzi: 一箱箱轴承和其他小型机械零件，

pairs.target: yǐjí shíchē àogé tǎkǎ díkè gǔwù :
pairs.english: and ten truck-loads of Orgota kardik-grain:
pairs.hanzi: 以及十车奥格塔卡迪克谷物：

pairs.target: zhèxiē dōu yào yùnwǎng pèilín fēngbào biānjìng ,
pairs.english: all bound for the Pering Storm-border,
pairs.hanzi: 这些都要运往佩林风暴边境，

pairs.target: yě jiùshì zhè piàn tǔdì de dōngběijiǎo .
pairs.english: the northeast corner of the land.
pairs.hanzi: 也就是这片土地的东北角。

pairs.target: dàlù shàng de suǒyǒu huòyùn dōu shì kào zhèxiē
pairs.english: All shipping on the Great Continent is by these
pairs.hanzi: 大陆上的所有货运都是靠这些

pairs.target: diàndòng kǎchē wánchéng de , zhèxiē kǎchē zài héliú hé yùnhé shàng kěyǐ zhuāngzài dào bóchuán shàng
pairs.english: electric-powered trucks, which go on barges on the rivers and canals
pairs.hanzi: 电动卡车完成的，这些卡车在河流和运河上可以装载到驳船上

pairs.target: zhǐyào yǒu tiáojiàn jiù zhèyàng . zài dàxuě fēngshān de jǐgè yuè lǐ ,
pairs.english: where possible. During the deep-snow months,
pairs.hanzi: 只要有条件就这样。在大雪封山的几个月里，

pairs.target: mànsù tuōlājī lí , dònglì xuěqiāo ,
pairs.english: slow tractor-plows, power-sledges,
pairs.hanzi: 慢速拖拉机犁、动力雪橇，

pairs.target: háiyǒu zài bīngfēng héliú shàng xíngshǐ de búdìngqī bīngchuán ,
pairs.english: and the erratic ice-ships on frozen rivers are the
pairs.hanzi: 还有在冰封河流上行驶的不定期冰船，

pairs.target: chúle huáxuěbǎn hé rénlì xuěqiāo wài , jiùshì wéiyī de jiāotōnggōngjù ;
pairs.english: only transport beside skis and manhauled sledges;
pairs.hanzi: 除了滑雪板和人力雪橇外，就是唯一的交通工具；

pairs.target: zài jiědòng jìjié , méiyǒu rènhé jiāotōnggōngjù shì kěkào de ;
pairs.english: during the Thaw no form of transport is reliable;
pairs.hanzi: 在解冻季节，没有任何交通工具是可靠的；

pairs.target: suǒyǐ dàbùfen huòyùn dōu jízhōng zài
pairs.english: so most freight traffic goes with a rush,
pairs.hanzi: 所以大部分货运都集中在

pairs.target: xiàtiān jìnxíng . nàshí dàolù shang mǎn shì shāngduì .
pairs.english: come summer. The roads then are thick with caravans.
pairs.hanzi: 夏天进行。那时道路上满是商队。

pairs.target: jiāotōng shì shòu guǎnkòng de ,
pairs.english: Traffic is controlled,
pairs.hanzi: 交通是受管控的，

pairs.target: měiliàngchē huò měizhī shāngduì dōu bìxū
pairs.english: each vehicle or caravan being required to keep in
pairs.hanzi: 每辆车或每支商队都必须

pairs.target: yǔ yántú de jiǎncházhàn bǎochí wúxiàndiàn liánxì .
pairs.english: constant radio touch with checkpoints along the way.
pairs.hanzi: 与沿途的检查站保持无线电联系。

pairs.target: yíqièdōuzài jìxùqiánjìn ,
pairs.english: It all moves along,
pairs.hanzi: 一切都在继续前进，

pairs.target: wúlùn duōme yōngjǐ , dōu yǐ měi xiǎoshí 25 yīnglǐ de sùdù píngwěn xíngshǐ
pairs.english: however crowded, quite steadily at the rate of 25 miles per
pairs.hanzi: 无论多么拥挤，都以每小时25英里的速度平稳行驶

pairs.target: dìqiú biāozhǔn . gé sēn rén qíshí kěyǐ ràng tāmen de chēliàng pǎo dé gèng kuài ,
pairs.english: hour (Terran). Gethenians could make their vehicles go faster,
pairs.hanzi: （地球标准）。格森人其实可以让他们的车辆跑得更快，

pairs.target: dàn tāmen bìng méiyǒu zhèyàng zuò .
pairs.english: but they do not.
pairs.hanzi: 但他们并没有这样做。

pairs.target: rúguǒ wèn tāmen wèishénme bú zhèyàng zuò ,
pairs.english: If asked why not,
pairs.hanzi: 如果问他们为什么不这样做，

pairs.target: tāmen huì fǎnwèn : " wèishénme ? " jiù xiàng wèn dìqiú rén wèishénme wǒmen de
pairs.english: they answer "Why?" Like asking Terrans why all our
pairs.hanzi: 他们会反问：“为什么？”就像问地球人为什么我们的

pairs.target: chēliàng yídìng yào kāi dé nàme kuài ;
pairs.english: vehicles must go so fast;
pairs.hanzi: 车辆一定要开得那么快；

pairs.target: wǒmen huì shuō : " wèishénme bù ne ? " gèyǒusuǒhào , wúfǎ zhēnglùn .
pairs.english: we answer "Why not?" No disputing tastes.
pairs.hanzi: 我们会说：“为什么不呢？”各有所好，无法争论。

pairs.target: dìqiú rén zǒng juéde bìxū búduànqiánjìn ,
pairs.english: Terrans tend to feel they've got to get ahead,
pairs.hanzi: 地球人总觉得必须不断前进，

pairs.target: yào qǔdé jìnbù . ér dōng xīng de rénmen ,
pairs.english: make progress. The people of Winter,
pairs.hanzi: 要取得进步。而冬星的人们，

pairs.target: tāmen shǐzhōng huó zài dìyīnián ,
pairs.english: who always live in the Year One,
pairs.hanzi: 他们始终活在第一年，

pairs.target: rènwéi jìnbù yuǎnbùrú dāngxià de cúnzài zhòngyào .
pairs.english: feel that progress is less important than presence.
pairs.hanzi: 认为进步远不如当下的存在重要。

pairs.target: wǒ de xǐhào shì dìqiú shì de ,
pairs.english: My tastes were Terran,
pairs.hanzi: 我的喜好是地球式的，

pairs.target: líkāi āi lún lǎng shí , wǒ duì shāngduì nàzhǒng yǒutiáobùwěn de
pairs.english: and leaving Ehrenrang I was impatient with the methodical
pairs.hanzi: 离开埃伦朗时，我对商队那种有条不紊的

pairs.target: xíngjìn sùdù gǎndào búnàifán ;
pairs.english: pace of the caravan;
pairs.hanzi: 行进速度感到不耐烦；

pairs.target: wǒ zhēn xiǎng tiàoxiàqù bēnpǎo .
pairs.english: I wanted to get out and run.
pairs.hanzi: 我真想跳下去奔跑。

pairs.target: wǒ hěn gāoxìng zhōngyú líkāi le nàxiē màncháng de
pairs.english: I was glad to get clear of those long
pairs.hanzi: 我很高兴终于离开了那些漫长的

pairs.target: bèi hēisè wūdǐng zhēbì de shítou jiēdào ,
pairs.english: stone streets overhung with black,
pairs.hanzi: 被黑色屋顶遮蔽的石头街道，

pairs.target: dǒuqiào de wūdǐng , háiyǒu wúshù de gāotǎ ,
pairs.english: steep roofs. and innumerable towers,
pairs.hanzi: 陡峭的屋顶，还有无数的高塔，

pairs.target: nàge méiyǒu yángguāng de chéngshì , wǒ de suǒyǒu jīhuì dōu biànchéng le
pairs.english: that sunless city where all my chances had turned
pairs.hanzi: 那个没有阳光的城市，我的所有机会都变成了

pairs.target: kǒngjù hé bèipàn .
pairs.english: to fear and betrayal.
pairs.hanzi: 恐惧和背叛。

pairs.target: shāngduì pá shàng kǎěr jiā fū shānlù shí , chángcháng duǎnzàn tíngliú ,
pairs.english: Climbing the Kargav foothills the caravan halted briefly but
pairs.hanzi: 商队爬上卡尔加夫山麓时，常常短暂停留，

pairs.target: zài lùbiān de lǚguǎn chīfàn .
pairs.english: often for meals at roadside inns.
pairs.hanzi: 在路边的旅馆吃饭。

pairs.target: xiàwǔ shífēn , wǒmen dìyīcì wánzhěng dì
pairs.english: Along in the afternoon we got our first full
pairs.hanzi: 下午时分，我们第一次完整地

pairs.target: zài shānlù dǐngshàng kàndào le zhěnggè shānmài de quánmào .
pairs.english: view of the range from a foothill summit.
pairs.hanzi: 在山麓顶上看到了整个山脉的全貌。

pairs.target: wǒmen kàndào le kē sītuōěr ,
pairs.english: We saw Kostor,
pairs.hanzi: 我们看到了科斯托尔，

pairs.target: nà zuò shān yǒu sìyīnglǐ gāo ,
pairs.english: which is four miles high,
pairs.hanzi: 那座山有四英里高，

pairs.target: cóng shānjiǎo dào shāndǐng ;
pairs.english: from foot to crest;
pairs.hanzi: 从山脚到山顶；

pairs.target: tā xīpō jùdà de qīngxié zhēzhù le
pairs.english: the huge slant of its western slope hid the
pairs.hanzi: 它西坡巨大的倾斜遮住了

pairs.target: tā běibiān de shānfēng ,
pairs.english: peaks north of it,
pairs.hanzi: 它北边的山峰，

pairs.target: qízhōng yǒuxiē gāo dá sānwànyīngchǐ .
pairs.english: some of which go up to thirty thousand feet.
pairs.hanzi: 其中有些高达三万英尺。

pairs.target: cóng kē sītuōěr wǎng nán , yízuòzuò shānfēng yīcì xiǎnxiàn ,
pairs.english: South from Kostor one peak after another stood out
pairs.hanzi: 从科斯托尔往南，一座座山峰依次显现，

pairs.target: zài wúsè de tiānkōng xià chéngxiànchū báisè de lúnkuò ;
pairs.english: white against a colorless sky;
pairs.hanzi: 在无色的天空下呈现出白色的轮廓；

pairs.target: wǒ shù le shù , yígòng yǒu shísān zuò ,
pairs.english: I counted thirteen,
pairs.hanzi: 我数了数，一共有十三座，

pairs.target: zuìhòu yízuò zài nánfāng de wùqì zhōng zhǐshì móhu de yìmǒ wēiguāng ,
pairs.english: the last an undefined glimmer in the mist of
pairs.hanzi: 最后一座在南方的雾气中只是模糊的一抹微光，

pairs.target: yuǎnyuǎndì zài nánfāng .
pairs.english: distance in the south.
pairs.hanzi: 远远地在南方。

pairs.target: sījī wèi wǒ yīyī shuōchū le zhè shísān zuò shān de míngzì ,
pairs.english: The driver named the thirteen for me,
pairs.hanzi: 司机为我一一说出了这十三座山的名字，

pairs.target: háigěi wǒ jiǎng le xuěbēng de gùshì ,
pairs.english: and told me stories of avalanches,
pairs.hanzi: 还给我讲了雪崩的故事，

pairs.target: háiyǒu lù chuán bèi shānfēng chuī lí dàolù de shì ,
pairs.english: and landboats blown off the road by mountain winds,
pairs.hanzi: 还有陆船被山风吹离道路的事，

pairs.target: yǐjí chúxuě duì zài nányǐ dàodá de gāodì bèikùn shùzhōu de jīnglì ,
pairs.english: and snow-plow crews marooned for weeks in inaccessible heights,
pairs.hanzi: 以及除雪队在难以到达的高地被困数周的经历，

pairs.target: děngděng ,
pairs.english: and so on,
pairs.hanzi: 等等，

pairs.target: tā yǒuhǎo dì shìtú xiàhu wǒ .
pairs.english: in a friendly effort to terrify me.
pairs.hanzi: 他友好地试图吓唬我。

pairs.target: tā miáoshù shuō céng qīnyǎnkàndào qiánmiàn de kǎchē
pairs.english: He described having seen the truck ahead of his
pairs.hanzi: 他描述说曾亲眼看到前面的卡车

pairs.target: dǎhuá hòu chōng xià le yìqiān yīngchǐ de xuányá ;
pairs.english: skid and go over a thousand-foot precipice;
pairs.hanzi: 打滑后冲下了一千英尺的悬崖；

pairs.target: lìngrén jīngqí de shì ,
pairs.english: what was remarkable,
pairs.hanzi: 令人惊奇的是，

pairs.target: tā shuō , shì nàliàngchē xiàluò de huǎnmàn .
pairs.english: he said, was the slowness with which it fell.
pairs.hanzi: 他说，是那辆车下落的缓慢。

pairs.target: tā sìhū huā le zhěnggè xiàwǔ huǎnhuǎn piāoluò dào
pairs.english: It seemed to take all afternoon floating down into
pairs.hanzi: 它似乎花了整个下午缓缓飘落到

pairs.target: shēnyuān lǐ , tā kàndào tā zhōngyú xiāoshī shí gǎndào fēichánggāoxìng
pairs.english: the abyss, and he had been very glad to see it
pairs.hanzi: 深渊里，他看到它终于消失时感到非常高兴

pairs.target: zuìzhōng xiāoshī ,
pairs.english: at last vanish,
pairs.hanzi: 最终消失，

pairs.target: yìdiǎn shēngyīn yě méiyǒu ,
pairs.english: with no sound at all,
pairs.hanzi: 一点声音也没有，

pairs.target: diào jìn le dǐbù sìshí yīngchǐ shēn de xuěduī lǐ .
pairs.english: into a forty-foot snowdrift at the bottom.
pairs.hanzi: 掉进了底部四十英尺深的雪堆里。

pairs.target: dìsān xiǎoshí wǒmen zài yìjiā
pairs.english: At Third Hour we stopped for dinner at a
pairs.hanzi: 第三小时我们在一家

pairs.target: dàxíng lǚguǎn tíngxiàlái chīwǎnfàn , nà shì gè yǒu jùdà bìlú hé
pairs.english: large inn, a grand place with vast roaring fireplaces and vast
pairs.hanzi: 大型旅馆停下来吃晚饭，那是个有巨大壁炉和

pairs.target: héngliáng wūdǐng de dà fángjiān , lǐmiàn bǎimǎn le měishí de cānzhuō ;
pairs.english: beam-roofed rooms full of tables loaded with good food;
pairs.hanzi: 横梁屋顶的大房间，里面摆满了美食的餐桌；

pairs.target: dàn wǒmen méiyǒu zài nàér guòyè .
pairs.english: but we did not stay the night.
pairs.hanzi: 但我们没有在那儿过夜。

pairs.target: wǒmen de shì wòpùchē duì ,
pairs.english: Ours was a sleeper-caravan,
pairs.hanzi: 我们的是卧铺车队，

pairs.target: yǐ kǎěr hǎidé shì de sùdù gǎnlù , xiǎng chéngwéi dìyīgè
pairs.english: hurrying (in its Karhidish fashion) to be the first
pairs.hanzi: 以卡尔海德式的速度赶路，想成为第一个

pairs.target: běnjì jìnrù pèilín fēngbào dìqū de chēduì ,
pairs.english: of the season into the Pering Storm country,
pairs.hanzi: 本季进入佩林风暴地区的车队，

pairs.target: wèi shāngrén men qiǎngzhànshìchǎng de xiānjī ,
pairs.english: to skim the cream of the market for its
pairs.hanzi: 为商人们抢占市场的先机，

pairs.target: shāngrén qǐyèjiā men . kǎchē diànchí bèi chóngxīn chōngdiàn ,
pairs.english: merchant-entrepreneurs. The truck-batteries were recharged,
pairs.hanzi: 商人企业家们。卡车电池被重新充电，

pairs.target: xīn yìbān sījī jiēshǒu ,
pairs.english: a new shift of drivers took over,
pairs.hanzi: 新一班司机接手，

pairs.target: wǒmen jìxù qiánxíng .
pairs.english: and we went on.
pairs.hanzi: 我们继续前行。

pairs.target: chēduì lǐ yǒu yíliàng kǎchē zuòwéi wòpùchē ,
pairs.english: One truck of the caravan served as sleeper,
pairs.hanzi: 车队里有一辆卡车作为卧铺车，

pairs.target: zhī gòng sījī shǐyòng .
pairs.english: for drivers only.
pairs.hanzi: 只供司机使用。

pairs.target: chéngkè méiyǒu chuángwèi .
pairs.english: No beds for passengers.
pairs.hanzi: 乘客没有床位。

pairs.target: wǒ zài hánlěng de jiàshǐshì lǐ dùguò le yèwǎn ,
pairs.english: I spent the night in the cold cab on
pairs.hanzi: 我在寒冷的驾驶室里度过了夜晚，

pairs.target: zuòzài jiānyìng de zuòwèi shàng ,
pairs.english: the hard seat,
pairs.hanzi: 坐在坚硬的座位上，

pairs.target: bànyè shí zài
pairs.english: with one break along near midnight for supper at
pairs.hanzi: 半夜时在

pairs.target: dōngtiān shí , píngyuán shàng de fēng kěnéng huì ràng
pairs.english: In winter the wind of the plains may keep
pairs.hanzi: 冬天时，平原上的风可能会让

pairs.target: chéngshì méiyǒu jīxuě ,
pairs.english: the city clear of snow,
pairs.hanzi: 城市没有积雪，

pairs.target: dàn dāng bàofēngxuě láilín , jīxuě duījī shí ,
pairs.english: but when it blizzards and piles up they do
pairs.hanzi: 但当暴风雪来临，积雪堆积时，

pairs.target: tāmen búhuì qīnglǐ jiēdào ,
pairs.english: not clear the streets,
pairs.hanzi: 他们不会清理街道，

pairs.target: yīnwèi gēnběn méiyǒu jiēdào kě qīnglǐ .
pairs.english: having no streets to clear.
pairs.hanzi: 因为根本没有街道可清理。

pairs.target: tāmen shǐyòng shítou suìdào ,
pairs.english: They use the stone tunnels,
pairs.hanzi: 他们使用石头隧道，

pairs.target: huòzhě zài xuě zhōng wā línshí tōngdào .
pairs.english: or burrow temporary ones in the snow.
pairs.hanzi: 或者在雪中挖临时通道。

pairs.target: fángzi zhǐyǒu wūdǐng lù zài wàimiàn ,
pairs.english: Nothing of the houses but the roof sticks out
pairs.hanzi: 房子只有屋顶露在外面，

pairs.target: gāochū xuě miàn ,
pairs.english: above the snow,
pairs.hanzi: 高出雪面，

pairs.target: dōngjì de mén kěnéng shèzài wūyánxià
pairs.english: and the winter-doors may be set under the eaves
pairs.hanzi: 冬季的门可能设在屋檐下

pairs.target: huòzhě zhíjiē zài wūdǐng shàng ,
pairs.english: or in the roof itself,
pairs.hanzi: 或者直接在屋顶上，

pairs.target: xiàng lǎohǔ chuāng yíyàng . jiědòng qī shì nà piàn píngyuán shàng zuì zāogāo de shíhòu ,
pairs.english: like dormers. The Thaw is the bad time on that plain
pairs.hanzi: 像老虎窗一样。解冻期是那片平原上最糟糕的时候，

pairs.target: nàlǐ yǒu xǔduō héliú .
pairs.english: of many rivers.
pairs.hanzi: 那里有许多河流。

pairs.target: nàshí suìdào jiù chéng le páishuǐ dào ,
pairs.english: The tunnels then are storm-sewers,
pairs.hanzi: 那时隧道就成了排水道，

pairs.target: jiànzhù zhījiān de kòngdì biànchéng le yùnhé huò húbó ,
pairs.english: and the spaces between buildings become canals or lakes,
pairs.hanzi: 建筑之间的空地变成了运河或湖泊，

pairs.target: léi ěr de rénmen jiù zài zhèxiē shuǐmiàn shàng huáchuán qù
pairs.english: on which the people of Rer boat to their
pairs.hanzi: 雷尔的人们就在这些水面上划船去

pairs.target: bànshì , yòng jiǎng bōkāi xiǎo bīngkuài .
pairs.english: business, fending off small ice-floes with the oars.
pairs.hanzi: 办事，用桨拨开小冰块。

pairs.target: érqiě wúlùn héshí , wúlùnshì xiàtiān de chénāi ,
pairs.english: And always, over the dust of summer,
pairs.hanzi: 而且无论何时，无论是夏天的尘埃，

pairs.target: dōngtiān wūdǐng de jīxuě hùnluàn ,
pairs.english: the snowy roof-jumble of winter,
pairs.hanzi: 冬天屋顶的积雪混乱，

pairs.target: háishì chūntiān de hóngshuǐ ,
pairs.english: or the floods of spring,
pairs.hanzi: 还是春天的洪水，

pairs.target: hóngsè de gāotǎ zǒngshì chùlì zhe ,
pairs.english: the red Towers loom,
pairs.hanzi: 红色的高塔总是矗立着，

pairs.target: nà shì chéngshì kōngkuàng de xīnzāng , wúfǎ cuīhuǐ .
pairs.english: the empty heart of the city, indestructible.
pairs.hanzi: 那是城市空旷的心脏，无法摧毁。

pairs.target: wǒ zhù zài yìjiān yīnyù yòu ángguì de lǚguǎn lǐ , cángshēn yú
pairs.english: I lodged in a dreary overpriced inn crouching in
pairs.hanzi: 我住在一间阴郁又昂贵的旅馆里，藏身于

pairs.target: gāotǎ de bèifēngchù .
pairs.english: the lee of the Towers.
pairs.hanzi: 高塔的背风处。

pairs.target: wǒ zài jīnglì le xǔduō èmèng hòu tiānyíliàng jiù qǐchuáng ,
pairs.english: I got up at dawn after many bad dreams,
pairs.hanzi: 我在经历了许多噩梦后天一亮就起床，

pairs.target: bìng xiàng nà qiāozhúgàng de rén fù le chuángwèi hé zǎocān de qián ,
pairs.english: and paid the extortioner for bed and breakfast and
pairs.hanzi: 并向那敲竹杠的人付了床位和早餐的钱，

pairs.target: hái fù le tā gěi wǒ de cuòwù zhǐlù fèi ,
pairs.english: inaccurate directions as to the way I should take,
pairs.hanzi: 还付了他给我的错误指路费，

pairs.target: ránhòu bùxíng chūfā qù zhǎo ào sè huò dé ,
pairs.english: and set forth afoot to find Otherhord,
pairs.hanzi: 然后步行出发去找奥瑟霍德，

pairs.target: nà shì lí léi ěr bùyuǎn de yízuò gǔlǎo jìng xiū suǒ .
pairs.english: an ancient Fastness not far from Rer.
pairs.hanzi: 那是离雷尔不远的一座古老静修所。

pairs.target: wǒ líkāi lǚguǎn búdào wǔshí mǎ jiù mílù le .
pairs.english: I was lost within fifty yards of the inn.
pairs.hanzi: 我离开旅馆不到五十码就迷路了。

pairs.target: wǒ ràng gāotǎ liúzài shēnhòu , bǎ nà jùdà de
pairs.english: By keeping the Towers behind me and the huge
pairs.hanzi: 我让高塔留在身后，把那巨大的

pairs.target: kǎěr jiā fū xuěbái de shānyǐng fàngzài yòucè ,
pairs.english: white loom of the Kargav on my right,
pairs.hanzi: 卡尔加夫雪白的山影放在右侧，

pairs.target: zhèyàng wǒ cái chū le chéng , cháonán zǒu qù ,
pairs.english: I got out of the city headed south,
pairs.hanzi: 这样我才出了城，朝南走去，

pairs.target: lùshang yùdào yígè nóngjiā háizi , tā gàosù
pairs.english: and a farmer's child met on the road told
pairs.hanzi: 路上遇到一个农家孩子，他告诉

pairs.target: wǒ qù ào sè huò dé gāi zài nǎlǐ guǎiwān .
pairs.english: me where to turn off for Otherhord.
pairs.hanzi: 我去奥瑟霍德该在哪里拐弯。

pairs.target: wǒ zhōngwǔ dàodá nàlǐ .
pairs.english: I came there at noon.
pairs.hanzi: 我中午到达那里。

pairs.target: yějiùshìshuō , wǒ zhōngwǔ dào le mǒugè dìfāng ,
pairs.english: That is, I came somewhere at noon,
pairs.hanzi: 也就是说，我中午到了某个地方，

pairs.target: dàn wǒ bìng bú quèdìng nà shì nǎér .
pairs.english: but I wasn't sure where.
pairs.hanzi: 但我并不确定那是哪儿。

pairs.target: nàlǐ zhǔyào shi yípiàn sēnlín huò nóngmì de shùlín ;
pairs.english: It was mainly a forest or a thick wood;
pairs.hanzi: 那里主要是一片森林或浓密的树林；

pairs.target: dàn zhèxiē shùlín bǐ nàge yǐ hùlín zhùchēng de guójiā lǐ
pairs.english: but the woods were even more carefully tended than
pairs.hanzi: 但这些树林比那个以护林著称的国家里

pairs.target: píngcháng de líndì háiyào jīngxīnzhàoliào ,
pairs.english: is usual in that country of careful foresters,
pairs.hanzi: 平常的林地还要精心照料，

pairs.target: xiǎolù yánzhe shānpō wānyán , chuānxíng zài
pairs.english: and the path led along the hillsideright in among
pairs.hanzi: 小路沿着山坡蜿蜒，穿行在

pairs.target: shùcóng zhōng . guò le yíhuìer , wǒ fāxiàn
pairs.english: the trees. After a while I became aware that there was
pairs.hanzi: 树丛中。过了一会儿，我发现

pairs.target: xiǎolù yòucè bùyuǎnchù yǒu yìjiān mùwū ,
pairs.english: a wooden hut just off the path to my
pairs.hanzi: 小路右侧不远处有一间木屋，

pairs.target: ránhòu wǒ yòu zhùyì dào zuǒbiān shāo yuǎnchù yǒu yízuò xiāngdāng dà de mùjiégòu jiànzhù ,
pairs.english: right, and then I noticed a quite large wooden building
pairs.hanzi: 然后我又注意到左边稍远处有一座相当大的木结构建筑，

pairs.target: jiù zài wǒ zuǒshǒubiān shāoyuǎn de dìfāng ;
pairs.english: a little farther off to my left;
pairs.hanzi: 就在我左手边稍远的地方；

pairs.target: bùzhī cóng nǎlǐ piāo lái yìgǔ yòurén de
pairs.english: and from somewhere there came a delicious smell of
pairs.hanzi: 不知从哪里飘来一股诱人的

pairs.target: xīnxiān zhàyú de xiāngwèi .
pairs.english: fresh frying fish.
pairs.hanzi: 新鲜炸鱼的香味。

pairs.target: wǒ mànmàn yánzhe xiǎolù zǒu zhe ,
pairs.english: I went slowly along the path,
pairs.hanzi: 我慢慢沿着小路走着，

pairs.target: yǒuxiē bùān .
pairs.english: a little uneasy.
pairs.hanzi: 有些不安。

pairs.target: wǒ bù zhīdào hàn dá lātǎ rén duì yóukè shì shénme tàidù .
pairs.english: I didn't know how the Handdarata felt about tourists.
pairs.hanzi: 我不知道汉达拉塔人对游客是什么态度。

pairs.target: shìshíshàng wǒ duì tāmen jīhū yìwúsuǒzhī .
pairs.english: I knew very little about them in fact.
pairs.hanzi: 事实上我对他们几乎一无所知。

pairs.target: hàn dálā shì yìzhǒng méiyǒu zǔzhī de zōngjiào ,
pairs.english: The Handdara is a religion without institution,
pairs.hanzi: 汉达拉是一种没有组织的宗教，

pairs.target: méiyǒu jìsī , méiyǒu děngjí ,
pairs.english: without priests, without hierarchy,
pairs.hanzi: 没有祭司，没有等级，

pairs.target: méiyǒu shìyán , yě méiyǒu jiàoyì ;
pairs.english: without vows, without creed;
pairs.hanzi: 没有誓言，也没有教义；

pairs.target: wǒ zhìjīn hái wúfǎ shuō qīng tā shìfǒu yǒu
pairs.english: I am still unable to say whether it has
pairs.hanzi: 我至今还无法说清它是否有

pairs.target: shénmíng .
pairs.english: a God or not.
pairs.hanzi: 神明。

pairs.target: tā hěn nán zhuōmō .
pairs.english: It is elusive.
pairs.hanzi: 它很难捉摸。

pairs.target: tā zǒngshì zài biéchù .
pairs.english: It is always somewhere else.
pairs.hanzi: 它总是在别处。

pairs.target: tā wéiyī gùdìng de tǐxiàn shì zài jìng xiū yuànlǐ ,
pairs.english: Its only fixed manifestation is in the Fastnesses,
pairs.hanzi: 它唯一固定的体现是在静修院里，

pairs.target: rénmen kěyǐ dào nàlǐ yǐnjū , dùguò
pairs.english: retreats to which people may retire and spend the
pairs.hanzi: 人们可以到那里隐居，度过

pairs.target: yíyè huò yìshēng .
pairs.english: night or a lifetime.
pairs.hanzi: 一夜或一生。

pairs.target: rúguǒ búshì chūyú hàoqí xiǎng jiědá yígè wèntí , wǒ gēnběn búhuì zhuīxún zhège shénmì nán zhuōmō de xìnyǎng
pairs.english: I wouldn't have been pursuing this curiously intangible cult
pairs.hanzi: 如果不是出于好奇想解答一个问题，我根本不会追寻这个神秘难捉摸的信仰

alignment.target: zhège shénmì nán zhuōmō de xìnyǎng
alignment.hanzi: 这个神秘难捉摸的信仰

pairs.target: shēnrù dào tā de mìmì zhī dì ,
pairs.english: into its secret places at all,
pairs.hanzi: 深入到它的秘密之地，

pairs.target: rúguǒ wǒ bùxiǎng jiědá nàge bèi
pairs.english: if I hadn't wanted to answer the question left
pairs.hanzi: 如果我不想解答那个被

pairs.target: diàocháyuán men liúxià wèi jiě de wèntí :
pairs.english: unanswered by the Investigators:
pairs.hanzi: 调查员们留下未解的问题：

pairs.target: yùyánzhě shì shénme ,
pairs.english: What are the Foretellers,
pairs.hanzi: 预言者是什么，

pairs.target: tāmen shíjìshang zuò shénme ?
pairs.english: and what do they actually do?
pairs.hanzi: 他们实际上做什么？

pairs.target: wǒ zài kǎěr hǎidé dài de shíjiān yǐjīng bǐ
pairs.english: I had been longer in Karhide now than the
pairs.hanzi: 我在卡尔海德待的时间已经比

pairs.target: diàocháyuán men hái cháng , wǒ huáiyí guānyú
pairs.english: Investigators had, and I doubted that there was anything to the
pairs.hanzi: 调查员们还长，我怀疑关于

pairs.target: yùyánzhě jíqí yùyán de chuánshuō shìfǒu zhēnshí .
pairs.english: stories of Foretellers and their prophecies.
pairs.hanzi: 预言者及其预言的传说是否真实。

pairs.target: yùyán de chuánshuō zài zhěnggè rénlèi shèhuì zhōng dū hěn chángjiàn ,
pairs.english: Legends of prediction are common throughout the whole Household
pairs.hanzi: 预言的传说在整个人类社会中都很常见，

pairs.target: shén huì shuōhuà ,
pairs.english: of Man. Gods speak,
pairs.hanzi: 神会说话，

pairs.target: línghún huì shuōhuà , jìsuànjī huì shuōhuà .
pairs.english: spirits speak, computers speak.
pairs.hanzi: 灵魂会说话，计算机会说话。

pairs.target: shényù de móhuxìng huò tǒngjì gàilǜ wèi qí tígōng le lòudòng ,
pairs.english: Oracular ambiguity or statistical probability provides loopholes,
pairs.hanzi: 神谕的模糊性或统计概率为其提供了漏洞，

pairs.target: ér xìnyǎng zé mǒ qù le suǒyǒu máodùn .
pairs.english: and discrepancies are expunged by Faith.
pairs.hanzi: 而信仰则抹去了所有矛盾。

pairs.target: búguò , zhèxiē chuánshuō háishì zhídé diàochá de .
pairs.english: However, the legends were worth investigating.
pairs.hanzi: 不过，这些传说还是值得调查的。

pairs.target: wǒ hái méiyǒu shuōfú rènhé kǎěr hǎidé rén xiāngxìn
pairs.english: I hadn't yet convinced any Karhider of the existence
pairs.hanzi: 我还没有说服任何卡尔海德人相信

pairs.target: xīnlínggǎnyìng de cúnzài ;
pairs.english: of telepathic communication;
pairs.hanzi: 心灵感应的存在；

pairs.target: tāmen zhǐyǒu " qīnyǎnsuǒjiàn " cái huì xiāngxìn :
pairs.english: they wouldn't believe it till they "saw" it:
pairs.hanzi: 他们只有“亲眼所见”才会相信：

pairs.target: zhè zhèngshì wǒ de lìchǎng ,
pairs.english: my position exactly,
pairs.hanzi: 这正是我的立场，

pairs.target: duìyú hàn dálā de yùyánzhě yě shì rúcǐ .
pairs.english: regarding the Foretellers of theHanddara.
pairs.hanzi: 对于汉达拉的预言者也是如此。

pairs.target: dāng wǒ yánzhe xiǎolù qiánxíng shí , wǒ yìshí dào
pairs.english: As I went on along the path I realized
pairs.hanzi: 当我沿着小路前行时，我意识到

pairs.target: zhěnggè cūnzhuāng huò xiǎozhèn fēnsàn zài
pairs.english: that a whole village or town was scattered about
pairs.hanzi: 整个村庄或小镇分散在

pairs.target: nà piàn qīngxié sēnlín de yīnyǐng xià ,
pairs.english: in the shadow of that slanting forest,
pairs.hanzi: 那片倾斜森林的阴影下，

pairs.target: yíqiè dōu xiàng léi ěr yíyàng záluànwúzhāng ,
pairs.english: all as random as Rer was,
pairs.hanzi: 一切都像雷尔一样杂乱无章，

pairs.target: dàn què yǐnmì , ānníng ,
pairs.english: but secretive, peaceful,
pairs.hanzi: 但却隐秘、安宁，

pairs.target: xiāngcūn qìxī . měi yízuò wūdǐng hé xiǎo lùshang dōu chuíguà zhe
pairs.english: rural. Over every roof and path hung the boughs of
pairs.hanzi: 乡村气息。每一座屋顶和小路上都垂挂着

pairs.target: hè mén shù , dōngjì zuì chángjiàn de shù ,
pairs.english: the hemmens, the commonest tree of Winter,
pairs.hanzi: 赫门树，冬季最常见的树，

pairs.target: yìzhǒng cūzhuàng de zhēnyèshù , cháng zhe hòushí de dànhóngsè zhēnyè .
pairs.english: a stout conifer with thick pale-scarlet needles.
pairs.hanzi: 一种粗壮的针叶树，长着厚实的淡红色针叶。

pairs.target: hè mén shù guǒ sànluò zài fēnchà de xiǎo lùshang ,
pairs.english: Hemmen-cones littered the branching paths,
pairs.hanzi: 赫门树果散落在分叉的小路上，

pairs.target: fēng zhōng mímànzhe hè mén shù huāfěn de xiāngqì ,
pairs.english: the wind was scented with hemmen-pollen,
pairs.hanzi: 风中弥漫着赫门树花粉的香气，

pairs.target: suǒyǒu de fángwū dōu shì yòng shēnsè de
pairs.english: and all the houses were built of the dark
pairs.hanzi: 所有的房屋都是用深色的

pairs.target: hè mén mù jiànchéng de . wǒ zuìzhōng tíngxià , yóuyù gāi qiāo nǎ shànmén
pairs.english: hemmen-wood. I stopped at last wondering which door to knock
pairs.hanzi: 赫门木建成的。我最终停下，犹豫该敲哪扇门

pairs.target: shí , yǒu gèrén cóngshùlín zhōng mànyōuyōu dì zǒu chūlái
pairs.english: at, when a person came sauntering out of the trees
pairs.hanzi: 时，有个人从树林中慢悠悠地走出来

pairs.target: bìng lǐmào dì xiàng wǒ dǎzhāohū .
pairs.english: and greeted me courteously.
pairs.hanzi: 并礼貌地向我打招呼。

pairs.target: " nǐ shì zài zhǎo zhùchù ma ? " tā wèndào .
pairs.english: "Will you be looking for a dwelling-place?" he asked.
pairs.hanzi: “你是在找住处吗？”他问道。

pairs.target: " wǒ shì dài zhe wèntí lái zhǎo yùyánzhě de . " wǒ
pairs.english: "I've come with a question for the Foretellers." I
pairs.hanzi: “我是带着问题来找预言者的。”我

pairs.target: juédìng ràng tāmen bǎ wǒ dàngzuò
pairs.english: had decided to let them take me,
pairs.hanzi: 决定让他们把我当作

pairs.target: zhìshǎo yì kāishǐ ,
pairs.english: at first anyhow,
pairs.hanzi: 至少一开始，

pairs.target: kǎěr hǎidé rén .
pairs.english: for a Karhider.
pairs.hanzi: 卡尔海德人。

pairs.target: xiàng diàocháyuán men yíyàng , wǒ cóngwèi yùdào guò
pairs.english: Like the Investigators I had never had any trouble
pairs.hanzi: 像调查员们一样，我从未遇到过

meta.synopsis: Genly Ai travels east across the Kargav mountains into Old Karhide, experiencing the culture and landscape of Gethen. He visits Otherhord Fastness to witness the Handdara Foretellers, seeking answers about the future of Gethen and the Ekumen, and learns about the limits and meaning of prophecy.
